description: Automate dependency management with Dependabot/Renovate, add vulnerability scanning (pip-audit/safety), and generate CycloneDX SBOM for supply chain transparency.
oracle_notes: No Dependabot or Renovate config exists. No vulnerability scanning in CI. No SBOM generation. Pixi/pip deps are declared in pyproject.toml and pixi.toml but are not audited automatically.
